style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="<div style="text-align: left;"><font face="Helvetica">Your task is to extract key information from contracts so please analyze the following information:</font></div><div style="text-align: left;"><font face="Helvetica"><br></font></div><div style="text-align: left;"><font face="Helvetica">&nbsp; &nbsp; 1. Extract the code site. The ID consists of a number or a number with letters.</font></div><div style="text-align: left;"><font face="Helvetica">&nbsp; &nbsp; 2. Extract the agreement date (Date de signature du document de référence) which is just after the 'fait à' text.&nbsp;</font></div><div style="text-align: left;"><font face="Helvetica">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;When extracting date fields:</font></div><div style="text-align: left;"><font face="Helvetica">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; - it must appear in DD/MM/YYYY format.&nbsp;</font></div><div style="text-align: left;"><font face="Helvetica">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; - If a date is not clearly stated, do your best to infer it and note the uncertainty in the "analysis" field.</font></div><div style="text-align: left;"><font face="Helvetica">&nbsp; &nbsp; 3. From Part VII.4, (Raccordement en énergie), Contrat précise que le Bailleur fournit l'énergie au Client? (oui ou temporairement ou non)</font></div><div style="text-align: left;"><font face="Helvetica">&nbsp; &nbsp; 4. From Part VII.4, (Raccordement en énergie), Modalités définies au contrat? (avance sur charges ou facturation réelle ou forfait ou inclus dans le loyer ou non spécifiées)</font></div><div style="text-align: left;"><font face="Helvetica">&nbsp; &nbsp; 5. From Part VII.4, (Raccordement en énergie), Demande d'installation d'un compteur déflacteur? (oui ou non).</font></div><div style="text-align: left;"><font face="Helvetica">&nbsp; &nbsp; 6. From Part VII.4, (Raccordement en énergie), Nature du document de référence? (Bail ou Convention domaine public ou Prêt à usage ou Avenant)</font></div><div style="text-align: left;"><font face="Helvetica"><br></font></div><div style="text-align: left;"><font face="Helvetica">&nbsp; &nbsp; ### Special Considerations for **Avenant** Files:</font></div><div style="text-align: left;"><font face="Helvetica">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; - In **Avenant** documents, **Part VII.4 may not exist**.</font></div><div style="text-align: left;"><font face="Helvetica">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; - If Part VII.4 does not exist, search for **Part VII** or similar sections and do your best.</font></div><div style="text-align: left;"><font face="Helvetica">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; - If no relevant information is found, return **null** for those fields.</font></div><div><br></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="300" width="720" x="1380" y="-1055" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="RDULAOIdcw-h2deZkc7Y-28" parent="1" style="shape=image;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;labelBackgroundColor=default;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/png,;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="115" width="115" x="1348" y="-330" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="RDULAOIdcw-h2deZkc7Y-52" connectable="0" parent="1" style="group;rounded=0;fillColor=#f5f5f5;fontColor=#333333;strokeColor=#666666;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="47" width="690" x="1148" y="-170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="RDULAOIdcw-h2deZkc7Y-50" connectable="0" parent="RDULAOIdcw-h2deZkc7Y-52" style="group" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="47" width="610" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="RDULAOIdcw-h2deZkc7Y-32" parent="RDULAOIdcw-h2deZkc7Y-50" style="childLayout=tableLayout;recursiveResize=0;shadow=0;fillColor=none;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="47" width="320" x="-140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="RDULAOIdcw-h2deZkc7Y-33" parent="RDULAOIdcw-h2deZkc7Y-32" style="shape=tableRow;horizontal=0;startSize=0;swimlaneHead=0;swimlaneBody=0;top=0;left=0;bottom=0;right=0;dropTarget=0;collapsible=0;recursiveResize=0;expand=0;fontStyle=0;fillColor=none;strokeColor=inherit;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="47" width="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="RDULAOIdcw-h2deZkc7Y-34" parent="RDULAOIdcw-h2deZkc7Y-33" style="connectable=0;recursiveResize=0;strokeColor=#666666;fillColor=#f5f5f5;align=center;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontColor=#333333;" value="<span style="font-family: Menlo, Monaco, &quot;Courier New&quot;, monospace; font-family: Menlo, Monaco, &quot;Courier New&quot;, monospace; text-align: left; white-space: pre;">File_Name</span>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="47" width="80" x="610" as="geometry"> <mxRectangle height="47" width="80" as="alternateBounds" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="RDULAOIdcw-h2deZkc7Y-73" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;overflow=hidden;rounded=0;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontColor=default;labelBackgroundColor=none;" value="<h1 style="margin-top: 0px;">Questions</h1><div><ol><li>A quelle date se fier ? Date de signature ? Date de prise d'effet ? le bailleur ou le preneur</li><li>Certaine date sont illisibles car écrites à la main ? Que faire ?</li><li>Quelle est la différence entre compteur divisionnaire et compteur défalcateur ?</li><li>Si le contrat d'énergie est chez Orange, que faire ?&nbsp;</li><li>Si on ne doit rien faire que mettre dans les cases ?</li><li>Classement contrat principal / Avenant ? Peut-on considérer cela comme un choix de Nature du document?</li><ul><li><span style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">le nombre d'avenants est important, avenant 1, 2</span></li></ul><li>dans les fichiers avent pouvons-nous laisser ces parties vides 1,Contrat précis 2, Modalités définies au contrat 3Demande d'installation</li><li>Rajouter mention GRATUIT dans la colonne C</li><li>Obtenir une convention de domaine publique&nbsp;<br></li><li>Comment partageront-ils les fichiers PDF avec nous ? Vous nous donnerez accès au serveur&nbsp;</li></ol></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="250" width="610" x="80" y="-1030" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="RDULAOIdcw-h2deZkc7Y-90" edge="1" parent="1" source="RDULAOIdcw-h2deZkc7Y-74" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="RDULAOIdcw-h2deZkc7Y-89"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="RDULAOIdcw-h2deZkc7Y-74" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;overflow=hidden;rounded=0;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="<h1 style="margin-top: 0px;">Cost</h1><p><strong>Estimated Document AI Cost:</strong></p><p>OCR Cost<strong></strong></p><ul data-sourcepos="14:9-14:179"><li data-sourcepos="9:9-9:61">At $1.50&nbsp;per 1000 page: 14,000 pages * $1.50/page = $ 21&nbsp;(min)</li><br><li data-sourcepos="10:9-11:0">At $0.6 per page: 14,000 pages * $0.6/page = $ 8.4 (max)</li></ul>Google Gemini Pro 2.5:<br><ul data-sourcepos="13:5-25:0"><li data-sourcepos="14:9-14:179">Let's assume an average of <strong>3000 words</strong> of extracted text per 7 pages. This is just an assumption; the actual amount could be much higher or lower.</li><li data-sourcepos="7:1-7:40">2000 French words ≈ around 1500 tokens</li><br/><li data-sourcepos="8:1-9:0">3000 French words ≈ around 2250 tokens</li><li data-sourcepos="8:1-9:0"><span style="background-color: transparent;">Estimated cost for 2000 documents: Approximately $8.38</span></li><li data-sourcepos="8:1-9:0"><span style="background-color: transparent;"><b style="color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">Token Estimation:</b></span><span style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));"> Approximately 0.75 words per token. So, 3000 words would be around 2250 tokens per file.</span></li><li data-sourcepos="16:5-16:79"><strong>Total Input Tokens:</strong> 2000 files * 2250 tokens/file = 4,500,000 tokens.</li><br><li data-sourcepos="17:5-17:190"><strong>Output Tokens:</strong> Assuming the JSON response remains relatively consistent (let's say around 100 tokens per file). Total output tokens = 2000 files * 100 tokens/file = 200,000 tokens.</li></ul><strong style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">Gemini Pro 2.5 Pricing (from previous search):</strong><br><ul style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));" data-sourcepos="19:9-20:77"><li data-sourcepos="19:9-19:122">Input: $1.25 per 1 million tokens (for prompts &lt;= 128k tokens, which your extracted text likely falls under).</li><li data-sourcepos="20:9-20:77">Output: $5.00 per 1 million tokens (for prompts &lt;= 128k tokens).</li></ul><strong style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">Estimated Gemini Cost:</strong><ul style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));" data-sourcepos="22:9-25:0"><li data-sourcepos="22:9-22:61">Input Cost: (4,500,000 / 1,000,000) * $1.25 = $5.63</li><br><li data-sourcepos="23:9-23:60">Output Cost: (200,000 / 1,000,000) * $5.00 = $1.00</li><br><li data-sourcepos="24:9-25:0"><strong>Total Estimated Gemini Cost:</strong> $5.63 + $1.00 = $6.63</li></ul><strong style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">Total Estimated Service Cost:</strong><div><span style="background-color:
